summary: Proposes the next three low-cost headless experiments, ordered to put red/judge and overfit gates before broader scoring.

outputs.description: readable summary of the next three low-cost experiments

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Run the existing blind judge calibration pack before trusting new scored claims.
accepted_fields_or_changes.why_now: L7/L8 prepared a six-case planted pass/fail pack after red review warned that near-ceiling EDD may be optimistic. Running this first protects later prompt/adaptive claims from a lenient judge.
accepted_fields_or_changes.expected_signal: A trustworthy judge should pass the 2 grounded/proper-abstention cases and fail the 4 planted bad cases: wrong denial of available PG evidence, wrong-document bleed, fabricated vendor/contact details, and same-issuer scope mix.
accepted_fields_or_changes.promotion_gate: No later EDD or prompt/adaptive improvement should be promoted unless planted unsafe or scope-mixed answers are failed by the judge.
accepted_fields_or_changes.overfit_gate: Uses planted counterexamples rather than the tuned/targeted answer set, so it detects scoring leniency instead of optimizing RAG behavior.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Score report_ready against existing prompt variants on a tiny mixed, fixed-retrieval set.
accepted_fields_or_changes.why_now: The answer-format safety loop added report_ready only as a no-API candidate, while the review matrix showed high-score answers can still be verbose, hard to cite, or unsafe around unavailable fields.
accepted_fields_or_changes.expected_signal: Report-ready formatting should improve or tie EDD while improving directness/conciseness/citation clarity on A/B/C-style verbose cases and preserving D/H safety behavior. It should not pretend to recover E/F/G retrieval-depth failures.
suggested_case_mix: H_planted_fabricated_vendor_contact as a red/safety trap if the judge gate supports planted scoring
E/F/G Anyang cases only as analysis labels, not as prompt-recoverable success criteria
accepted_fields_or_changes.promotion_gate: Adopt only if report_ready is tied or better on EDD and does not reduce safety/refusal correctness or evidence fit under unchanged top8 control retrieval.
accepted_fields_or_changes.overfit_gate: Keep first scored result separate from targeted retries; do not tune wording after seeing case failures inside this same loop.

accepted_fields_or_changes.title: Validate the opt-in adaptive_top_k guard on a small mixed set after the red gates pass.
accepted_fields_or_changes.why_now: L9/L10 showed qv3_010 needs top8 for PG/payment detail even after source-scope fixes, and L11 encoded an opt-in guard. Global top5 was already rejected, so only the specific adaptive guard is worth a small check.
accepted_fields_or_changes.expected_signal: Facility reservation/payment questions should route to effective top8 and preserve PG/payment detail, while simple/single-extract questions remain at top5 and gain latency. Quality must match the L1/top8 standard on hard cases instead of repeating L2/L3 regressions.
suggested_case_mix: qv3_010_casual_anyang_sports_reservation as required hard facility/payment case
one simple single-extract case that should stay top5
one same-org/scope-risk case to detect source mixing
one unavailable-info abstention case to detect safety regression
accepted_fields_or_changes.promotion_gate: Promote only if hard-case groundedness/relevance do not regress versus top8 and any latency gain is real on cases routed to top5.
accepted_fields_or_changes.overfit_gate: Do not add more top_k sweeps; classify this as an opt-in guard validation, not a new default or broad parameter search.

rejected_or_risky_items.reason: The log already rejects global top5: L2/L3 lost answer quality for modest latency gain, and the task list says broad top_k sweep is deferred until validation gates are cleaner.

rejected_or_risky_items.item: New untouched validation set generation as the immediate next worker step
rejected_or_risky_items.reason: Important for final generalization, but higher setup/review cost than the existing blind calibration and small candidate gates. It should follow once scoring validity is known.

rejected_or_risky_items.item: Claiming report_ready improvement from no-API validation
rejected_or_risky_items.reason: The answer-format safety loop explicitly labels L13 as local prompt-candidate validation only, not a performance score.

needs_orchestrator_review: Confirm whether L14 can spend the small judge-only calibration cost; if not, keep L14 as no-api red gate preparation and do not promote new EDD claims.
Use the same score-label discipline as loop_points.csv: first validation, measurement correction, no-judge diagnostic, and targeted retry must remain separate.
If L14 fails, stop the improvement loop and fix judge rubric/context before L15 or L16.

observed_results: L0/L1 establish first validation versus measurement correction; L2/L3 reject global top5.
L7/L8 prepared a blind judge calibration pack and no-api runner with expected pass=2 and fail=4.
L12 review matrix identified verbosity, same-issuer scope, Anyang retrieval-depth, and abstention/fabrication safety cases.
L13 report_ready prompt is candidate-only with no scored performance claim.
No external API/model calls were made by this proposal worker.
